mapper.sql: payment_id, order_no, user_id, product_id, payment_method, payment_status, pg_provider, pg_transaction_id, amount, paid_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dummy_payments WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM dummy_payments ORDER BY payment_id DESC

SELECT
FROM dummy_payments WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY payment_id DESC

SELECT
FROM dummy_payments WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY payment_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT dp.payment_id, dp.order_no, dp.user_id, dp.product_id, pp.product_code, pp.product_name, dp.payment_method, dp.payment_status, dp.pg_provider, dp.pg_transaction_id, dp.amount, dp.paid_at, dp.created_at AS payment_created_at, dp.updated_at AS payment_updated_at, pg.grant_id, pg.grant_type, pg.status AS grant_status, pg.granted_at, pg.expires_at, pr.refund_id, pr.refund_status, pr.refund_amount, pr.refund_reason, pr.pg_provider AS refund_pg_provider, pr.pg_refund_transaction_id, pr.requested_at AS refund_requested_at, pr.completed_at AS refund_completed_at, pr.failed_at AS refund_failed_at, pr.failure_code AS refund_failure_code FROM dummy_payments dp LEFT JOIN payment_products pp ON pp.product_id = dp.product_id LEFT JOIN premium_grants pg ON pg.payment_id = dp.payment_id AND pg.user_id = dp.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_refunds pr ON pr.payment_id = dp.payment_id AND pr.user_id = dp.user_id WHERE dp.user_id = #{userId} AND dp.payment_status IN ('PAID', 'REFUNDED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELED') ORDER BY COALESCE(dp.paid_at, dp.created_at) DESC, dp.payment_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dummy_payments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND payment_status IN ('PAID', 'REFUNDED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELED')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dummy_payments ( order_no, user_id, product_id, payment_method, payment_status, pg_provider, pg_transaction_id, amount, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{pgProvider}, #{pgTransactionId}, #{amount}, #{paidAt} )

INSERT INTO dummy_payments ( order_no, user_id, product_id, payment_method, payment_status, pg_provider, pg_transaction_id, amount ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{paymentMethod}, 'PENDING', #{pgProvider}, #{pgTransactionId}, #{amount} )

INSERT INTO dummy_payments ( order_no, user_id, product_id, payment_method, payment_status, pg_provider, pg_transaction_id, amount, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{paymentMethod}, 'PAID', #{pgProvider}, #{pgTransactionId}, #{amount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE dummy_payments SET payment_status = 'PAID', pg_provider = #{pgProvider}, pg_transaction_id = #{pgTransactionId}, paid_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND payment_status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE dummy_payments SET payment_status = 'FAILED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND payment_status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE dummy_payments SET payment_status = 'CANCELED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND payment_status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE dummy_payments SET payment_status = 'REFUNDED', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND payment_status = 'PAID'

UPDATE dummy_payments SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, product_id = #{productId}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, pg_provider = #{pgProvider}, pg_transaction_id = #{pgTransactionId}, amount = #{amount}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}
